result.stdout:
vs-secrets 2.2.2 (.NET 8.0, commit e62927ee)
Copyright (c) 2024 Ernesto Cianciotta

Usage: vs-secrets [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  change-key    Change the encryption key. By default re-encrypts all existing
                secrets with the new key.
  clear         Delete all the solution secrets from the local machine.
  configure     Configure the repository to use by default or for the solution
                in the current directory.
  init          Create the encryption key and setup all needed authorizations to
                remote repositories.
  pull          Pull solution secrets and decrypt them.
  push          Push encrypted solution secrets.
  search        Search for solution secrets.
  status        Shows the status for the tool and the solutions.

Run 'vs-secrets [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
vs-secrets 2.2.2 (.NET 8.0, commit e62927ee)
Copyright (c) 2024 Ernesto Cianciotta

Usage: vs-secrets [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  change-key    Change the encryption key. By default re-encrypts all existing
                secrets with the new key.
  clear         Delete all the solution secrets from the local machine.
  configure     Configure the repository to use by default or for the solution
                in the current directory.
  init          Create the encryption key and setup all needed authorizations to
                remote repositories.
  pull          Pull solution secrets and decrypt them.
  push          Push encrypted solution secrets.
  search        Search for solution secrets.
  status        Shows the status for the tool and the solutions.

Run 'vs-secrets [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Change the encryption key. By default re-encrypts all existing secrets with the new key.

Usage: vs-secrets change-key [options]

Options:
  -p|--passphrase      Passphare for creating the encryption key.
  -f|--keyfile <path>  Key file path to use for creating the encryption key.
  -s|--skipencryption  Skip the re-encryption of secrets encrypted with the old
                       key.
  -?|-h|--help         Show help information.

commands.payload:
Change the encryption key. By default re-encrypts all existing secrets with the new key.

Usage: vs-secrets change-key [options]

Options:
  -p|--passphrase      Passphare for creating the encryption key.
  -f|--keyfile <path>  Key file path to use for creating the encryption key.
  -s|--skipencryption  Skip the re-encryption of secrets encrypted with the old
                       key.
  -?|-h|--help         Show help information.

result.stdout:
Delete all the solution secrets from the local machine.

Usage: vs-secrets clear [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path          Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
Delete all the solution secrets from the local machine.

Usage: vs-secrets clear [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path          Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
Configure the repository to use by default or for the solution in the current directory.

Usage: vs-secrets configure [command] [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path          Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  --default     Changes the default configuration.
  -r|--repo     Repository type to use for the solution.
                Allowed values are: github, azurekv.
  -n|--name     Repository name to use for the solution. This setting applies
                only for Azure Key Vault.
  --reset       Reset the configuration of the solution.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  list          List the configuration for solutions.

Run 'configure [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Configure the repository to use by default or for the solution in the current directory.

Usage: vs-secrets configure [command] [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path          Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  --default     Changes the default configuration.
  -r|--repo     Repository type to use for the solution.
                Allowed values are: github, azurekv.
  -n|--name     Repository name to use for the solution. This setting applies
                only for Azure Key Vault.
  --reset       Reset the configuration of the solution.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  list          List the configuration for solutions.

Run 'configure [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
List the configuration for solutions.

Usage: vs-secrets configure list [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path          Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  --all         When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
Push encrypted solution secrets.

Usage: vs-secrets push [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path            Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  --all           When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.
  -o|--overwrite  Does not merge remote secrets with local ones, but overwrites
                  them with locals.
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information.

commands.payload:

  -o|--overwrite  Does not merge remote secrets with local ones, but overwrites
                  them with locals.
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information.

result.stdout:
Shows the status for the tool and the solutions.

Usage: vs-secrets status [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path             Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

Options:
  --all            When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.
  -d|--duplicates  When true, shows also duplicate solutions.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

commands.payload:

  -d|--duplicates  When true, shows also duplicate solutions.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.
